description_long: This object is a standard urban traffic light mounted on a tall, rectangular pole with a sturdy base. The signal housing is rectangular and contains three distinct circular lenses arranged vertically, colored red, yellow, and green from top to bottom. The pole and housing are constructed from a gray metallic material, giving the object a robust and weather-resistant appearance. The base is wide and solid, designed to anchor the structure securely to the ground. The signal lights are slightly recessed within the housing, providing some protection from the elements. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for visibility and durability in outdoor urban environments.
description: A gray, pole-mounted traffic light with three vertically stacked signal lights (red, yellow, green) in a rectangular housing and a solid base.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three signal lights (red, yellow, green) clearly within the rectangular housing.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the signal housing and the protruding lenses, with the pole and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the housing and the supporting pole, with no signal lights visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth of the housing and the pole structure.
